subject: Add PM Mapper blueprint for Frankfurt
commit_message:

Change-Id: I60d4d7398b1a1151b9dae43d1480905d5186cfe6
Signed-off-by: JoeOLeary <joseph.o.leary@est.tech>

(2 comments)

Was this deployment of this blueprint successful in your env? When locally tried (after correcting plugin), i see the pm-mapper pod is failing healhcheck.
